title: Purity
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Purity''''' was a [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battle cruiser]] of the [[Duskhan League]].

==History==
In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], the ''Purity'' was under the command of [[Primate/Legends|Primate]] [[Vol Noorr]], and stationed at [[Doornik-1142/Legends|Doornik-1142]], possibly guarding one of the [[Type II Orbital Repair Yard|Type II orbital repair yards]] the Yevetha had seized from the Empire. While here, she encountered the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] mapping ship ''[[Astrolabe]]'', disabling her with accurate gunnery. This done, Vol Noorr sent an encrypted [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] transmission to [[Nil Spaar]] aboard the flagship [[Aramadia (Aramadia-class)|''Aramadia'']], then on a diplomatic mission at [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], indicating that ''Purity'' was equipped with the sort of powerful communications equipment sometimes associated specifically with [[Command ship/Legends|command ships]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Before the Storm (abridged audiobook)|''Before the Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
